name: Software Engineer
description: Software engineers design, develop, and maintain software systems. They work with programming languages, frameworks, and tools to build applications, APIs, and infrastructure that powers modern technology.
bullets: Developed and deployed scalable microservices architecture handling 2M+ daily requests using Node.js and Kubernetes
Reduced API latency by 45% through strategic caching implementation and database query optimization
Led migration from monolithic application to distributed services, improving deployment frequency by 300%
